blank_issues_enabled: false
contact_links:
  - name: 💬 General Chat
    url: https://github.com
    about: For non-feature related talk.

body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ### 💡 Have a great idea for the Arena? 
        Fill out the details below so we can discuss how to build it!
  - type: textarea
    id: pitch-description
    attributes:
      label: "What is your idea?"
      description: "Explain the feature. (e.g., 'A way for players to split the pitch cost')."
      placeholder: "I think we should add..."
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: user-value
    attributes:
      label: "Why is this useful?"
      description: "How does this help someone booking a pitch?"
  - type: dropdown
    id: priority
    attributes:
      label: "How urgent is this?"
      options:
        - "Nice to have"
        - "Essential for Launch"
        - "Future Goal"
